Welcome

Derrell Willis

Virginia Beach Web Developer & Product Manager

Virginia Beach Web Developer

About Me

Helping Hampton Roads businesses build a better web presence

I'm a Virginia Beach-based web developer and PMP-certified Product Manager with over 10 years of experience in web development, product management, and developer relations. I help small businesses in the Hampton Roads area build, fix, and maintain their websites, from simple landing pages to full custom builds. I also bring deep experience in product lifecycle management, leading cross-functional teams of up to 160 personnel, and leveraging data-driven strategies to deliver results that align with real business goals.

0+

Articles Published
0+
Communities Built

What I Offer

Affordable web services for small businesses in Virginia Beach and the Hampton Roads area.

New Websites

Custom websites built from scratch for your business. Mobile-friendly, fast, and designed to convert visitors into customers.

Website Fixes & Updates

Broken pages, outdated content, slow load times? I will diagnose and fix the issues holding your site back.

Redesigns

Give your existing site a modern look that builds trust and reflects the quality of your business.

Local SEO

Get found on Google by customers in Virginia Beach and Hampton Roads. I will make sure your site shows up when it matters.

My Experience

January 2026 - Present

Product Manager

InMotion Hosting

Own the full product lifecycle from discovery through launch, iteration, and end-of-life. Define and maintain product roadmaps balancing customer needs, business priorities, and technical feasibility. Collaborate with Engineering, Marketing, Operations, and Support to drive go-to-market execution and customer satisfaction.

Product lifecycle ownershipRoadmap strategyCross-functional collaborationData-driven decisions
September 2023 - January 2026

Manager, Developer Relations

InMotion Hosting

Orchestrated cross-functional projects between Marketing, Developer Relations, and Product teams. Led and mentored a team of associates while cultivating strategic partnerships with developers and organizations.

Cross-functional leadershipContent marketing pipelineYouTube & SEO optimizationCommunity engagement
August 2019 - September 2023

Manager, Customer Success

InMotion Hosting

Led a team of 7 Supervisors managing 80-100 personnel. Orchestrated a large-scale transition for 160 team members to a cutting-edge Omnichannel platform. Drove company-wide NPS initiatives and implemented KCS methodologies.

Team leadership (160+)Agile & WaterfallPlatform migrationNPS & KCS initiatives
December 2018 - July 2019

Supervisor, Customer Success

InMotion Hosting

Directed daily operations for 8-12 front-line associates across Technical Support and Service tiers. Established the foundation for the Customer Success department while maintaining 75%+ KPI attainment.

Operations managementKPI optimizationTalent developmentProcess standardization
June 2017 - December 2018

Technical Support Team Lead

InMotion Hosting

Served as the primary technical escalation point and mentor for the support department, resolving complex server and software issues. Managed a pod that consistently met 100% of performance goals.

Technical escalationQuality assuranceTeam mentorshipServer troubleshooting
May 2008 - November 2016

Public Safety Telecommunicator II

City of Norfolk

Managed high-stakes emergency communications using CAD systems and advanced radio networks. Acted as Supervisor for dispatch operations and modernized the department's web content.

Emergency communicationsDispatch supervisionCrisis interventionWeb content management

My Portfolio

Client Sites

Whyzerr

Business website for a tech-powered private office suite company in downtown Macon, GA. Built with WordPress and Elementor featuring smart booking, AI answering service info, and responsive design.

WordPressElementorWPForms
Live
Client Sites

San Diego ADUs

Informational website for an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) company in San Diego, helping homeowners navigate ADU construction and regulations.

WordPressWeb DesignSEO
Client Sites

ANU Vision 4 Me

Website for a Virginia-based mental health services provider offering home-based counseling and support for adults, children, and families. Built with WordPress and Kubio.

WordPressKubioBooking System
Live
Web Apps

TourWax

A live music discovery platform aggregating concert tour dates, venue info, and artist news for 2,200+ artists. Features SEO-optimized landing pages via SSG + ISR, dynamic OG images, structured data, time-based discovery pages, and affiliate revenue integration.

Get In Touch

Need a website built or fixed? Want to collaborate? Based in Virginia Beach and serving the Hampton Roads area. Reach out!

Let's Connect

Whether you need a new website, want to fix an existing one, or just want to chat about your business's web presence, I'd love to hear from you. Local to Virginia Beach and happy to meet in person.
